text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I walk along the river, I spot Kawakami
Princess being cheered on by some children.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hiyaaaah! This is the Princess Full Drive!

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Wow, that was perfect! You're amazing!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Eh-heh-heh. That's all there is to it! What special
technique shall I show you next?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer! Right now, I'm showing off special
moves and transformation poses from Princess
Fighter!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'm accepting requests, too! If there's one you
want to see, Trainer, let's see that hand raised
high!

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text:
I just had an idea! Since your trainer's here, you
can show us that Final Form one now!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Huh?! The Final Form transformation?! As in...

text_block_list.name: Princess Fighter
text_block_list.text: Here we go, my prince! Final... Fooooorm!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Where Princess Fighter leaps into the air with
literally earth-shattering force, gazing into the
prince's eyes as they spin faster and faster...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Then they glide elegantly along the water's surface in a waltz before striking a pose and transforming? THAT Final Form?!

text_block_list.name: Girl B
text_block_list.text:
That sounds awesome! I wanna see it! Do the Final
Form with your trainer!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hrmmm... I-I suppose if we pulled off such an incredible move, it would be rather...
choice_data_list:
Um, I don't know about that... Someone might
get badly—

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Glance...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Glance! Glance!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami looks at me eagerly, her eyes pleading
me to change my mind. What should I do?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami looks at me eagerly, her eyes pleading
me to change my mind. What should I do?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Yay! That's my trainer for you!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Come here—let me grab a hold of you! I can
launch us both into the air!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Final... Fooooorm!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Are you ready to twirl?! ...Now! Spin around thirty
times!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Next, we waltz across the water! Make sure to
place your next foot before the other one sinks!

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text:
Wow! This is crazy! They're really gliding on top
of the water!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If there's anything to learn from this adventure,
it's that you can do anything when your life
depends on it...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm thrust into the air and quickly begin spinning.
It feels like my spirit's going to fly right out of my
body!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
It's okay, Trainer! Just lean into my arms! Now, it's
time to waltz across the water!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I rely on Kawakami Princess's strength to do most
of the work, and we somehow manage to recreate
the transformation sequence.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Now, Trainer! Gaze into my eyes!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?! Trainer? Traaaineeer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our Final Form came really close to becoming my
final moment...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
You can't be serious! Why would you—do you
have any idea how badly I wanted to try it?!

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: Glance. Glance.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Glance! Glance!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Whyyy? Boo...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, I buy candy for Kawakami Princess
and the children to stop their pouting. It proves a
highly effective solution.
